Title: xCMS - Get Page Content Query
Preconditions: CMS pages configured in store; GraphiQL UI loaded
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { pages(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" keyword: "") { totalCount items { id name relativeUrl content } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify page content
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] totalCount > 0
[DATA] items[] non-empty; each page has id, name, relativeUrl
[DATA] content populated (not empty string)
[DATA] relativeUrl starts with /
[DATA] No HTML injection artifacts in content (no unescaped script tags)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute query → same pages returned
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; totalCount = 0; content empty; relativeUrl malformed; script injection in content
